title: Add default timeout to agent subprocess calls
description: Add a timeout parameter to all subprocess.run() calls in runner.py. Default 600 seconds (10 minutes) for main _exec_json calls in both CodexAgentRunner and ClaudeCodeAgentRunner, and 300 seconds (5 minutes) for the _retry_structured_output call. Catch subprocess.TimeoutExpired and raise RuntimeError with a clear timeout message (e.g. 'Agent timed out after 600 seconds'). The scheduler already handles RuntimeError from the runner and will mark the bead as blocked. If externalized configuration (OrchestratorConfig / BackendConfig) is available in the runner, expose the timeout as a config parameter. If config is not yet wired in, use the hardcoded defaults.
acceptance_criteria: All 3 subprocess.run() calls in runner.py have a timeout parameter
Main exec calls timeout at 600 seconds by default
Retry call timeouts at 300 seconds by default
subprocess.TimeoutExpired is caught and converted to RuntimeError with a descriptive message
If OrchestratorConfig is available, timeout is read from config; otherwise hardcoded defaults are used
